## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125]
- SyncCinema version: [e.g. v2.1.1]
- Node.js version: [e.g. v22.12.0]

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or console logs to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
